zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Dudley於1535年出生時，他的父親Captain Henry Dudley18歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton16歲。他於1575年6月8日與Susannah Thorne在英國貝德福爾利德林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1586年在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Dudley于1535年出生时，他的父亲Captain Henry Dudley18岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton16岁。他于1575年6月8日与Susannah Thorne在英国貝德福爾利德林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1586年在荷兰蓋爾德藍德享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Dudley was born in 1535, his father, Captain Henry Dudley, was 18 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton, was 16. He married Susannah Thorne on 8 June 1575, in Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1586, in Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Dudley est né en 1535, son père, Captain Henry Dudley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Susannah Thorne le 8 juin 1575, à Lidlington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1586, à Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Dudley 1535 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Captain Henry Dudley 18 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton 16. Er hat am 8. Juni 1575 in Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England Susannah Thorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1586 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Geldern, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Dudley è nato il nel 1535, il suo padre, Captain Henry Dudley, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Susannah Thorne il 8 giugno 1575, nel Lidlington, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1586, nel Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Dudleyが1535年に生まれた時，父Captain Henry Dudleyは18歳，母Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashtonは16歳であった。1575年6月8日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアリドリントンでSusannah Thorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1586年にオランダジェルダーランドで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Dudley(이)가 1535년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Captain Henry Dudley(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1575년 6월 8일 영국 베드퍼드실르 리들링턴에서 Susannah Thorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1586년 네덜란드 글델랜드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Dudley nasceu em 1535, seu pai, Captain Henry Dudley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Susannah Thorne em 8 de junho de 1575, em Lidlington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1586, em Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Dudley родился в 1535 г., его отцу по имени Captain Henry Dudley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah Thorne 8 июня 1575 г. в местности лидлингтон, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1586 г. в местности джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Dudley nació en 1535, su papá, Captain Henry Dudley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Susannah Thorne el 8 de junio de 1575, en Lidlington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1586, en Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 52 años.
